name: VrcAssetOrganizer
description: Desktop asset manager for VRchat avatar creators — organizes, tags, and browses 3D assets downloaded from online marketplaces
author: Moji

build.sizeTarget: <100 MB disk, <150 MB RAM at runtime

paths.library: user-configurable via Preferences > Assets Storage Path

tag_reviews.description: Records user accept/reject decisions on auto-assigned tags per asset

tag_cooccurrence.description: Tracks co-occurrence counts between tag pairs for suggestion ranking

columns.name: asset_id
columns.constraints: PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES assets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

cover_labels_v2.description: Enhanced cover labels with image metadata for ML training — one best cover per asset

tag_labels.description: Tag labeling session records for ML training — stores accept/reject decisions in JSON arrays

Asset.notes: filepath is Path object; thumbnail is Optional[Path]; notes is str; scan_state is 'pending' | 'done'; trash_date is Optional[float] for soft-delete

tagSystem.structure: Flat list — tags have no parent/child relationships in the DB. TAG_HIERARCHY in tag_data.py is used only for auto-tagging implication (detecting 'Earrings' auto-adds 'Accessory').

genre.description: Every asset gets exactly one genre, auto-detected on import via suggest_genre(). User can override in inspector.
genre.detection: Keyword-based: GENRE_KEYWORDS in auto_tagger.py + tag set analysis via GENRE_TAG_MAP

avatar.description: Canonical avatar names from TOP_AVATARS in tag_data.py. Japanese name aliases in JP_AVATAR_TO_EN resolve to the same English tag.
avatar.picker: AvatarPickerDialog in sidebar.py — searchable checkbox list ordered by community popularity

additional.description: All other tags — clothing, accessories, body parts, materials, styles. Auto-tagged from filenames via suggest_tags() using WORD_TO_TAG dictionary and token matching.

autoTagging.flow: ImportWorker._import_one → suggest_tags(filename, extracted_path) → suggest_genre(filename, filetype, tag_names) → add all to asset

booth_zip.description: Scans asset marketplace zip archives — classifies entries, extracts preview thumbnails via _thumb_score heuristic, detects nested .unitypackage and .zip

unitypackage.description: Parses Unity asset packages (tar.gz format), resolves GUID directory names via /pathname metadata

rarfile_scanner.description: Scans RAR archives via rarfile library — requires unrar utility on system PATH

fbx_obj.description: Handles FBX and OBJ 3D model files

imagefile.description: Image files — used directly as thumbnail source

menuBar: Preferences (Dark Mode, Unity Path, Storage Path, Settings...)
Tools (Batch Thumbnails, Label Tags, Label Covers, Manage Tags, Export Training Data, Import Training Data, Purge Cache & Packages)

children: BodyMapWidget (interactive avatar silhouette, 2:3 aspect ratio, 180x270 default)
Genre chip buttons (Avatar Base, Outfit & Acce, Gimmick, Tools) — exclusive toggle, OR logic
Avatar chip buttons (top 60, filtered to those with count > 0) — OR logic
Tag chip buttons (AND-logic multi-select, excludes genre + avatar names)
Info QGroupBox (type, size, path, modified, added) — path elided from front
Genre QGroupBox (ChipToggleButton exclusive group — auto-detected, user-overridable)
Avatar QGroupBox (ChipToggleButton flow for top 30 avatars — tap to assign, tap to remove)
Additional Tags QGroupBox (TagChip flow + Add Tag button → popup menu of unassigned non-genre, non-avatar tags)
Contents QTreeWidget (name, type, size columns) — types show subtype like 'image (psd)', sizes in B/KB/MB/GB
Open With QGroupBox (tool buttons from DEFAULT_TOOL_MAP)

AssetListModel.caching: In-memory _ids list populated by fetchMore(); data() queries DB per-role
AssetListModel.filtering: or_tag_ids (UNION — body/genre/avatar), and_tag_ids (INTERSECTION — tag tree), filetypes list, search_query (FTS5 prefix)

signalFlow.Import: AssetListView.filesDropped → MainWindow._on_files_dropped → ImportWorker (QRunnable) → signals.finished → model.refresh() + sidebar.refresh() + grid.select_asset_ids()
signalFlow.Filter: Sidebar.tag_filter_changed(or_ids, and_ids) → MainWindow._on_tag_filter → _apply_filters → model.set_filter(or_tag_ids, and_tag_ids) → model.refresh()
signalFlow.GenreChange: InspectorPanel genre chip toggled → _on_genre_chip_toggled → remove old genre tag + add new genre tag
signalFlow.ToolLaunch: InspectorPanel.open_with / AssetContextMenu.open_in → MainWindow._on_open_with → ToolRegistry.get() → ToolLauncher.launch() → subprocess.Popen
signalFlow.TagLabeling: Tools > Label Tags → TagLabelerDialog(queries, thumb_cache_dir) → user toggles tag chips + selects genre + adds via search → save_tag_label → labeling_complete → sidebar.refresh + model.refresh
signalFlow.CoverLabeling: Tools > Label Covers → CoverLabelerDialog(queries, thumb_cache_dir) → user clicks best cover image (keyboard 1-6) or selects cached fallback → save_cover_label_v2 → labeling_complete → _regenerate_labeled_thumbs → ThumbWorker
signalFlow.PurgeCache: Tools > Purge Cache & Packages → MainWindow._on_purge_cache → delete thumbnails/*.png + library/* → queries.reset_all_thumbs_pending() → model.refresh() + sidebar.refresh()

threadingModel.main: Qt event loop — all UI widgets, model, delegate
threadingModel.import: QThreadPool.globalInstance() — ImportWorker (QRunnable) per batch; WorkerSignals uses AutoConnection to queue emissions to main thread
threadingModel.toolLaunch: subprocess.Popen with DETACHED_PROCESS — fire-and-forget, no thread blocking

themingModel.mechanism: QPalette + DWM API for Windows title bar

codeQuality.importStyle: All imports at file top — no inline imports inside functions
codeQuality.caching: AssetListModel uses _asset_cache dict to avoid N+1 queries when rendering thumbnails
codeQuality.stateSync: Sidebar preserves _genre_ids and _avatar_ids across chip rebuild, restoring checked state after recreation
codeQuality.helpers: Inspector uses _find_or_create_tag() helper to DRY up tag lookup/creation
codeQuality.singleInstance: app.py uses Win32 named mutex for reliable single-instance check

directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/ui/: Qt UI components (main_window, sidebar, inspector, thumbnail_grid, body_map, context_menu, tag_dialog, tag_labeler, settings_dialog, drop_overlay, theme, chip_button, flow_layout, cover_labeler)
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/database/: SQLite schema, connection pool, query layer
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/scanner/: File-type scanners (booth_zip, unitypackage, rarfile_scanner, blend, fbx, image, generic + orchestrator)
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/workers/: Async QRunnable workers (import, thumb, watcher) + base class. Note: watcher.py is defined but not yet wired up.
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/auto_tagger.py: Auto-tag engine — tokenization, WORD_TO_TAG matching, avatar detection, genre classification
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/tag_data.py: Tag dictionaries — TOP_AVATARS, WORD_TO_TAG, JP_AVATAR_TO_EN, TAG_HIERARCHY, GENRE_KEYWORDS
directoryLayout.vrc_organizer/unity_windows.py: Win32 API for detecting running Unity Editor windows
directoryLayout.build.py: PyInstaller build orchestrator with aggressive Qt module exclusions
